post.title: Minimum Depth of Binary Tree: Pattern and Complexity Walkthrough

post.problemInMyWords: In my own words, this problem asks me to solve Minimum Depth of Binary Tree with a correct and efficient strategy while handling edge cases cleanly. I explicitly restate input-output intent to avoid ambiguity before coding.
post.approach: I focus on choosing the right data structure and reducing repeated work. I validate complexity, edge cases, and produce maintainable code for interview discussion. I also note one brute-force baseline first, then explain the optimized path.
keyPoints: Clarify constraints and expected output before coding.
